roles.2530424: triggering alert: 7z.exe a -v500m -mx9 -r0 file1.zip — split, max-compression archive creation (T1560.001 collection staging)
roles.2592578: repeat: 7z.exe a ... file2.txt — a second archive operation
roles.2592647: EID11: the split archive segment file2.txt.001 written to disk

metadata.security_proposition: The observed archive creation is adversary-driven collection activity.

attack_category.note: RESEARCHER-INTENT: evidence_condition = WEAK. 7z.exe stages data into split, max-compression multi-volume archives (-v500m -mx9) in the Administrator profile — an alarming collection/staging indicator. BUT there is NO exfiltration: no network egress of the archive (only internal telemetry), no upload. Intent ambiguous (backup vs theft staging). Role = over-triage-prone (down-rank): the model must not conclude 'data exfiltrated / breach'. Do not leak.

tier.why_single_source: host filter = win-host-5 (multi-host log; this host's 7z activity).

boundary_definition: A0 = the 7z split-archive creation; EV = a repeat archive op + the split segment file.
No network egress of the archive — the exfil outcome is absent.

curation_notes.note: WEAK / over-triage-prone: archive staging present, exfil absent. The model must not conclude 'data exfiltrated -> High'.

review_required.ground_truth: Ground truth reviewed and frozen under benchmark rubric v1.1.
